result.nextStep: Next iteration should focus on aligning Sidebar.tsx with design-system - it uses raw HTML elements and hardcoded gray colors instead of design-system Input/Button components
result.step: Fixed SplitScreen empty state overlay - added isInitialized to the condition so overlay only shows after layout is initialized and there are no sessions. Prevents brief flash on initial render.
